name: OrderDeliveryEnquiry
description: problems with my delivery, didn't receive the delivery, order is delayed, the details on the delivery do not match, check delivery details, questions about delivery

sampleUtterances.utterance: Where is my parcel and when can I expect it to arrive?
Can you check if my order for the new {productTypeOrder} has been confirmed and sent?
My tracking says my package was delivered, but I haven't received anything.
I was expecting my {productTypeOrder} today but it hasn't turned up yet.
Can you provide a status update on my {productTypeOrder} delivery?
My delivery was lost by Yodel; what are the next steps?
My package was sent to the wrong address; how do I fix this?
I received my {productTypeOrder} but there was no remote control in the package.
My {productTypeOrder} arrived broken/damaged and needs to be replaced.
The courier tried to deliver while I was out; how do I reschedule?
My {productTypeOrder} self-install pack has not arrived and my install date is tomorrow.
I need to change my delivery address before the kit is dispatched.
Can I amend my delivery date to a day when I am home?
I want to change my home delivery to a local pick-up point instead.
How do I cancel a scheduled delivery for my {productTypeOrder} equipment?
Can I delay my delivery until I have moved into my new property?
I spoke to an engineer who promised three {productTypeOrder} , but I only received one.
I’ve ordered a {productTypeOrder} and {productTypeOrder2} package but only the SIM card has arrived.
My new {productTypeOrder} was not delivered with the rest of my equipment.
I haven't received the return packaging to send back my old {productTypeOrder}
Report a missing parcel.
Change my delivery details.
Check the delivery address for my current order.
Manage my equipment delivery
